title: Request for Bids – Contract work for developing mobile web-based application for Mariner’s Dashboard
summary: AOOS is looking for a contractor to develop a web-based application for the Mariner’s Dashboards ( Prince William Sound , Cook Inlet and Kodiak ) that can serve as a prototype that is used to solicit feedback for future development of a native (iOS and Android) application. title: Arctic projects measuring currents and recording whale songs get new funding
summary: Projects measuring the ocean currents around Wainwright, Point Barrow and Cape Simpson, as well as recording and analyzing whale and walrus sounds in the Arctic, are receiving new funding for equipment updates.
